keyPoints: Dealing with noise: K-Means is sensitive to outliers and noise in the data.
K-Means Neural Network: K-Means can be applied to neural networks to improve their performance.
Normalization: Normalizing the data before feeding it into K-Means can improve its performance.
Better Weight Update Rule: Using the L2 regularization update rule can improve the convergence rate of K-Means.
Comp: Using the compact representation of the data can improve the performance of K-Means.
